'''zayasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uwabaki|uwabaki]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uwabaki|uwabaki]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zayasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæyæsæth|zæyæsæth]] || [[word:zæyæsæj|zæyæsæj]] || [[word:zæyæsæsh|zæyæsæsh]] || [[word:zæyæsæ|zæyæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayayasath|zayayasath]] || [[word:zayayasaj|zayayasaj]] || [[word:zayayasash|zayayasash]] || [[word:zayayasa|zayayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayasath|zayasath]] || [[word:zayasaj|zayasaj]] || [[word:zayasash|zayasash]] || [[word:zayasa|zayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayafsath|zayafsath]] || [[word:zayafsaj|zayafsaj]] || [[word:zayafsash|zayafsash]] || [[word:zayafsaf|zayafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zayasatha|zayasatha]] || [[word:zayasaja|zayasaja]] || [[word:zayasasha|zayasasha]] || [[word:zayasaka|zayasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zayasath|zayasath]] || [[word:zayasaj|zayasaj]] || [[word:zayasash|zayasash]] || [[word:zayasa|zayasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zayasathal|zayasathal]] || [[word:zayasajal|zayasajal]] || [[word:zayasashal|zayasashal]] || [[word:zayasakal|zayasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zayasathatha|zayasathatha]] || [[word:zayasajaja|zayasajaja]] || [[word:zayasashasha|zayasashasha]] || [[word:zayasaka|zayasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zayasathan|zayasathan]] || [[word:zayasajan|zayasajan]] || [[word:zayasashan|zayasashan]] || [[word:zayasakan|zayasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zayasathaoro|zayasathaoro]] || [[word:zayasajaoro|zayasajaoro]] || [[word:zayasashaoro|zayasashaoro]] || [[word:zayasakaoro|zayasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
